content.fact_text: A production-ready health monitoring module providing centralized connectivity status and liveness probes for the infrastructure layer.

provenance_data.behaviour: Initializes a HealthMonitorService that orchestrates health probes for PostgreSQL, Redis, and Kafka using Opossum circuit breakers. It provides real-time infrastructure status and monitors process responsiveness via event loop lag tracking.
provenance_data.utility: Centralized health monitoring ensuring operational reliability through infrastructure connectivity auditing and system responsiveness checks.
